MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-24-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER - DEFENDANTS' EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND ORDER RULING ON DEFENDANTS' OBJECTIONS

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT EDWARDS LIFESCIENCES CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. ASSUMING DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF TO PLAINTIFF, PLAINTIFF HAS PRESENTED SEVERAL MATERIAL DISPUTES OF FACT, INCLUDING 22, 41, 56, 61, 66, 68, 71, 74 AND 79. PLAINTIFF HAS A SINGLE CAUSE OF ACTION BASED ON VARIOUS ALLEGED ACTS. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS NOT AN AVAILABLE REMEDY GIVEN THE SINGLE CAUSE OF ACTION AND MULTIPLE DISPUTED FACTS. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED ON DEFENDANTS' EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS. ORDER RULING ON DEFENDANTS' OBJECTIONS SIGNED. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
